programme.title: Live FIA World Endurance Championship
programme.desc: Coverage from the 24 Hours of Le Mans, as the third round of the season takes place at Circuit de la Sarthe in Le Mans, France. This prestigious race, first held in 1923, is the oldest endurance event in the world, and is one of three races in the 'triple crown' alongside the Formula 1 Monaco Grand Prix and the Indycar Indianapolis 500. Legendary British driver Graham Hill is the only driver to complete the triple crown, while Fernando Alonso only needs to win the Indianapolis 500 to add his name to history.

programme.title: Live FIA World Endurance Championship
programme.desc: Coverage from the 24 Hours of Le Mans, as the third round of the season takes place at Circuit de la Sarthe in Le Mans, France. This prestigious race, first held in 1923, is the oldest endurance event in the world, and is one of three races in the 'triple crown' alongside the Formula 1 Monaco Grand Prix and the Indycar Indianapolis 500. Legendary British driver Graham Hill is the only driver to complete the triple crown, while Fernando Alonso only needs to win the Indianapolis 500 to add his name to history.
